app_release_notes: v0.15 - Predicted DOPE. Set your bullet and muzzle velocity and Loadscope predicts your whole DOPE table (elevation and wind, 100 to 1000 yards) with a ballistic solver validated against the industry-standard JBM. Predicted numbers show in grey; type what you actually dialed at the range and the cell turns solid white - confirmed. Predictions never overwrite confirmed data. 34 popular match bullets have BCs built in; for any other bullet just type its BC, and the bullet database grows over time with no app update. Tune BC, temperature, pressure and wind and re-predict on the fly. The printed Pocket Card marks predicted rows under a 'PREDICTED - verify at the range' banner. The guided demo now walks the whole thing.
